name: FULL HOUSE RESORTS INC
business: Full House Resorts, Inc. owns, leases, operates, develops, manages, and invests in casinos and related hospitality and entertainment facilities. It operates six casinos and benefits from two active sports wagering websites. The company generates revenue from slot machines, table games, hotels, food and beverage, and other amenities.
sellsTo: local residents in Lake County, Illinois; Mississippi Gulf Coast; Colorado Springs/Denver; Cincinnati/Indianapolis/Louisville; Lake Tahoe
online sports bettors in Indiana and Illinois

exposures.sentence: owns, leases, operates, develops, manages, and/or invests in casinos and related hospitality and entertainment facilities.
We currently benefit from two active sports wagering websites (referred to as skins), one in Indiana and one in Illinois.
Our gaming customers may attempt or commit fraud or cheat in order to increase winnings.

catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we completed the sale of Stockman's Casino to a privately-owned company.

catalysts.event: Extension of sports wagering skin in Indiana through December 2031 with full prepayment
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we agreed with an operator to extend its use of our active sports wagering skin in Indiana through December 2031, and such operator fully prepaid its remaining term for the Indiana skin.

catalysts.event: Waukegan City Council approved revised site plans for permanent American Place facility
catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, the Waukegan City Council unanimously approved our revised site plans.

catalysts.event: Start construction of permanent American Place facility
catalysts.sentence: We will seek building permits and begin construction, anticipated in March or April 2026.

catalysts.event: Opening of permanent American Place casino

tamClaims.claim: Lake County, Illinois has a population of approximately 719,000.
tamClaims.sentence: Waukegan is the county seat of Lake County, which has a population of approximately 719,000.

tamClaims.claim: Colorado Springs/Pueblo/Canon City metropolitan area has a population of approximately one million.
tamClaims.sentence: Its customers are primarily from the Colorado Springs/Pueblo/Ca on City metropolitan area, the second-largest metropolitan area in Colorado, with a population of approximately one million people.

tamClaims.claim: Denver metropolitan area has a population of approximately four million people.
tamClaims.sentence: Its secondary market, the Denver metropolitan area, has a population of approximately four million people.

tamClaims.claim: American Place is the closest casino to more than one million individuals.
tamClaims.sentence: Including areas neighboring Lake County, we estimate that American Place is the closest casino to more than one million individuals.
